---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description / 问题描述

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce / 复现步骤

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior / 期望行为

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior / 实际行为

What actually happened. Include screenshots if applicable.

## Environment / 环境

- macOS version: <!-- e.g. macOS 14.5 -->
- TodoBoard version: <!-- e.g. v1.0.0, found in Settings → General -->
- Mac: <!-- e.g. MacBook Pro M3 -->

## Additional Context / 附加信息

Add any other context about the problem here. Attach crash logs if available (`~/Library/Logs/DiagnosticReports/`).
